creator: emz@norma.perm.ru
text:
FreeBSD has crashed during smbfs operations.

Version: FreeBSD gw0.qwerty.perm.ru 10.2-STABLE FreeBSD 10.2-STABLE #0: Thu Mar 10 14:30:22 YEKT 2016     emz@gw0.qwerty.perm.ru:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/QWERTY  amd64

(yup, for some reason revision isn't displayed, but it's r291767, accordinf to the sources)
